lede: A look at May 26 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Ward Cunningham and John Wayne, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2025 Liverpool parade attack
events.desc: 65 people are injured when a car rams into a crowd on Water Street, near Liverpool F.C.'s Premier League trophy parade.

events.title: George Floyd protests
events.desc: Protests triggered by the murder of George Floyd erupt in Minneapolis–Saint Paul, later becoming widespread across the United States and around the world.

events.title: I-40 bridge disaster
events.desc: The tugboat Robert Y. Love collides with a support pier of Interstate 40 on the Arkansas River near Webbers Falls, Oklahoma, resulting in 14 deaths and 11 others injured.

events.title: The Beatles
events.desc: The Beatles' album Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band is released.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Operation Dynamo: In northern France, Allied forces begin a massive evacuation from Dunkirk, France. The Battle of Dunkirk begins simultaneously as Allied defenders fight to slow down the German offensive.

events.title: House Un-American Activities Committee
events.desc: In the United States, the House Un-American Activities Committee begins its first session.

events.title: Abraham Lincoln
events.desc: President Abraham Lincoln signs legislation organizing the Montana Territory.

events.title: Grue Church fire
events.desc: At least 113 people die in the Grue Church fire, the biggest fire disaster in Norway's history.

events.title: Portuguese Restoration War
events.desc: Portuguese Restoration War: Portuguese and Spanish forces both claim victory in the Battle of Montijo.

events.title: Geneva
events.desc: Geneva expels John Calvin and his followers from the city. Calvin lives in exile in Strasbourg for the next three years.

births.name: Ward Cunningham
births.line: American computer programmer, developed the first wiki

births.name: Matt Stone
births.line: American actor, animator, screenwriter, producer, and composer

births.name: Jack Kevorkian
births.line: American pathologist, author, and assisted suicide activist

births.name: Sally Ride
births.line: American physicist and astronaut, founded Sally Ride Science

deaths.text: Augustine of Canterbury, Benedictine monk and archbishop

observances.text: Christian feast day: Augustine of Canterbury (Anglican Communion and Eastern Orthodox)
Christian feast day: Mariana de Jesús de Paredes
Christian feast day: Martyrs of the Paris Commune
Christian feast day: Peter Sanz (one of Martyr Saints of China)
